description_long: This apple is round with a slightly irregular shape, featuring a blend of muted red and green hues across its smooth, semi-glossy skin. The surface is dotted with small, subtle yellowish speckles, giving it a natural, fresh-picked appearance. A short, brown stem protrudes from the top, slightly angled and textured. The apple's coloration transitions from a deeper red on one side to a lighter greenish-yellow on the other, suggesting natural ripening. The skin appears firm and unbroken, with no visible blemishes or damage. Its size and proportions are typical of a medium apple, suitable for hand-held consumption.
description: A round apple with red and green mottled skin, smooth and semi-glossy, featuring a short brown stem.
description_view_0: Red-dominant side with yellow speckles and visible stem.
description_view_1: Lighter greenish-yellow side with subtle red blush and stem visible.
description_view_2: Red side with some green patches and prominent stem.
description_view_3: Deepest red side, minimal green, stem upright and central.
